mapper.insert: insert into kh_disease_article_detail_text (article_id, full_article, create_time, update_time) values (#{articleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fullArticle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: select article_id, full_article, create_time, update_time from kh_disease_article_detail_text
